title: senecio helenitis var. arvernensis
intro: Senecio helenitis var. arvernensis, also known as Arvensis, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family and is native to Europe. It has been used traditionally for its medicinal properties, including being a bitter tonic and a digestive aid, due to the presence of pyrrolizidine alkaloids. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving liver function, although its long-term use may be associated with potential liver damage. Herbal preparations of Arvensis, such as tinctures and infusions, have been used in traditional medicine, but it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using this plant, due to its potential toxicity and side effects.
